title: CPvP Nino Nakano + Anime sky
description: The PvP/CPvP resource pack "Nino Nakano" adds a variety of textures, from the sky overlay to the GUI and sounds.
body:
![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca41e97ca3bc4602f30bbeaf8232bf8e35c51f3d.png)
# This anime PvP resource pack in a red theme replaces or adds the following features:
- Animated inventory
- Custom GUI
- Main menu background
- Totem
- Custom sword
- Sky overlay 
- Item textures
- Inventory has been updated
- New widgets
- Small Items
- Sounds
- Enchantment Glint
- Crystals
## The best version for this resource pack is 1.21.x and above.
**On older versions, textures may display incorrectly or be completely missing. 
I will fix this issue soon.**
## For sky overlays to work correctly on Fabric, you will need the following mods:
1. [Nuit](https://modrinth.com/project/YBz7DOs8)
2. [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/project/DWuwk8aA)
## If you have any problems with sky overlay:
- Check if "Custom Sky" is enabled in your graphics settings.
- Check other included resource packs, they might be interferin
### If you enjoy this project, consider following!
